message:
bench(pipeline): add Criterion benchmarks for unified scan pipeline (ft-2oph2)

Five benchmark groups: end-to-end throughput vs size, stage decomposition
(metrics-only vs triggers vs compression), payload types, chunked vs batch
mode with varying chunk sizes, and compression level impact.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -344,6 +344,10 @@ harness = false
 name = "pattern_trigger"
 harness = false
 
+[[bench]]
+name = "scan_pipeline"
+harness = false
+
 [[test]]
 name = "proptest_daemon"
 path = "tests/proptest_daemon.rs"
